我李善奉命，镇守截教大门，任何截教弟子，许进不许出，非我截教弟子，不得入内！
“我是长耳定光仙，快快让开！”
【叮，恭喜守门人挡住定光仙，获得先天阴阳神光一道！】
“吾乃外门第一赵公明，你敢拦我？”
【叮，恭喜守门人挡住赵公明，获得凶兽黑虎一头，万年修为！】
【叮，恭喜守门人守门百年，获得万年修为加持！】
金灵圣母：“徒儿，为师要外出一趟，速速让开！”
【叮，恭喜守门人挡住金灵圣母，获得星辰万象之躯，先天鸿蒙之气一道！】
封神榜已经签好了，但，截教的弟子都出不去了。
通天圣人：“你这徒孙，就算是本圣人，也不能出去吗？”
“师公，截教之人许进不许出，这是您说的啊！”
就这样，李大善人将所有截教弟子都给拦在了金鳌岛之上。
元始天尊：啊，截教不出来，那封神我们打谁去？
鸿钧：“贫道去金鳌岛看看，究竟是怎么回事儿！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/11a675eb9448f2c5e8f900567b042d00","author":"明火江成","author_id":"","book_id":"7455638518778317848","book_name":"封神初始：我在金鳌岛布阵堵大门","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303840","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":731,"name":"封神","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=731&name=封神&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7457183553734855705","read_count":"12761","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1123321"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.0","serial_count":"483","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,东方玄幻,洪荒,系统,封神","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0eee9d2b429387e985098ccee69a2c75~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779469482&x-signature=AK0rVGdrI19W%2BzXoMXpocgJO%2FjY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"49"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324010442111F31E1FB9D9CAC94E4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_durati
